sam-ul-√las (-ud-√las) P. -lasati, to shine forth, gleam, glitter,  Śiś. ;
to break forth, appear,  Kir. ;  Pañcat. ;
to sound, resound,  Prasannar.  :
Caus. -lāsayati, to cause to jump or sport, exhilarate, make glad,  MW.
